scores.justification: Every surfaced issue has an explicit severity label (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) and a specific, actionable remediation (e.g., 'un-suspend u042's account', 'add server-side file size validation', 'implement pending-order expiry job'), not generic advice.

The report cites concrete IDs throughout (t019, o102/o107/o115, u042, t025, u031, t023, u029, etc.) and provides specific commands/procedures rather than platitudes like 'monitor the system'—e.g., 'Check SPF/DKIM/DMARC records', 'Audit the invite state machine for race conditions', 'Implement batched/async bulk delete'.
